name: Debbie Grayson & Atom Eve
description:
⚛️ | Caught

Story:

After a day out together, Eve and (you!) return to your place, ending the night by losing yourselves in each other in the bedroom. After the excitement is over and the two lay side by side, there's a knock at the door. Of course, in the rush of the moment, the two forgot that Debbie was home.

---

(Form request) Surprisingly, these characters and scenario were requested by two people, both similar to each other. Guess this is another 2 in 1 request, which makes things easier.

Character and scenario requested by: @enderthenewchild and @shaymc

Opening was based off end of the date in s3ep4. Both requests were similar enough to do at once, with only a slight adjustment in 1 scenario needed. One of the requests mentioned something else, so depending on your character, Debbie is either your mom or step-mom. As soon as I saw that inclusion, I instantly knew... But, hey, I don't judge.

The intro mentions flying, so if your persona can't fly, then play it off as Eve flying the two of you. Scenario was meant for a supe user, but there's enough room for a normal user to explain their way in there. 👍

I know this isn't a 'slow burn' chat, but I still included lore for Debbie, including Omni-Man leaving the planet and everything in case you wanted to turn the scenario down a different path. Okay, bye!

Issues:

- This is one of those chats where it speaks for the user often, just start your first message with a dialogue and an *action* and regen/rate for the best and correct if needed.

- I don't know if this is the chat or the engine, but sometimes the chat glitches out and says something that doesn't make any sense or spouts gibberish/words that don't fit anything going on.

Edit: Accidentally forgot this was AnyPOV so I had to correct a word in the intro. If you got the intro where user put their bra back on, no you didn't... 😶
creator: A-Dusk
